page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.48xlarge is a general-purpose instance type based on the x86_64 architecture. It features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T25 processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance does not employ hyperthreading, allocating exactly one thread per physical core to ensure dedicated compute resources. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 96 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. Because it lacks local storage, users must rely on external block storage options, which represents a key architectural tradeoff for storage-heavy workloads.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g9a.48xlarge offers high resource density and dedicated compute allocation, making it suitable for large-scale enterprise applications. Appropriate workloads include web serving, general-purpose enterprise applications, CI/CD pipelines, and distributed databases that require high network throughput and balanced CPU-to-memory resources without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.48xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance powered by AMD EPYC 9T25 processors running at 2.7 GHz. It provides 192 dedicated vCPUs and 192 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation. The instance is configured with 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 96 Gbps and runs on the KVM hypervisor. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external storage attachments. It is designed for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, and web serving environments that require high network throughput and balanced compute-to-memory resources.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute platform featuring a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and high-speed network connectivity for enterprise workloads.

768.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio
